stemHtml: An aircraft not equipped with EFIS has an inflight master caution. How can the pilots know what the failure is?

options.a: The pilots should check the annunciator panel of the flight warning system.
options.b: The pilots should refer to the quick reference handbook.
options.c: It is type specific, so the pilots should check the FCOM abnormal procedures.
options.d: The pilots should refer to the emergency checklist.
